Alias.name: AD.PARTY_KEY
Alias.select: DECODE( AD.DEFT_CASE_PARTY_NO, null, null, AD.DEFT_PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || AD.DEFT_CASE_PARTY_NO )

Alias.name: DIVIDENDS
Alias.select: ( SELECT NVL(SUM(DD.DD_AMOUNT),0) FROM DEBT_DIVIDENDS DD WHERE DD.DD_ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND DD.CREATED = 'Y' )

Alias.name: PASSTHROUGHS
Alias.select: ( SELECT NVL(SUM(PY.AMOUNT),0) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.ALD_DEBT_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'Y' AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y' )

LinkedSQL.SQL: (SELECT AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "AD.DEBT_SEQ" , P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "P.DX_NUMBER" , P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO" , P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER" , P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE" , GA.UPDATED_BY AS "GA.UPDATED_BY" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.VALID_TO AS "GA.VALID_TO" , NULL AS "CP.CODE" , 'EXISTING' AS "STATUS" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" , NULL AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND GA.ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND GA.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND (GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO CRED') AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL ) UNION ( SELECT AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "AD.DEBT_SEQ" , P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "P.DX_NUMBER" , P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO" , P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER" , P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE" , GA.UPDATED_BY AS "GA.UPDATED_BY" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.VALID_TO AS "GA.VALID_TO" , CP.CODE AS "CP.CODE" , 'EXISTING' AS "STATUS" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" , CP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , CODED_PARTIES CP , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND CP.PARTY_ID = AD.CP_CREDITOR_ID AND P.PARTY_ID = CP.PARTY_ID AND GA.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' )

(SELECT AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "AD.DEBT_SEQ" , P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "P.DX_NUMBER" , P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO" , P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER" , P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE" , GA.UPDATED_BY AS "GA.UPDATED_BY" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.VALID_TO AS "GA.VALID_TO" , NULL AS "CP.CODE" , 'EXISTING' AS "STATUS" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" , NULL AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND GA.ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND GA.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND (GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO PAYEE') AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL ) UNION ( SELECT AD.DEBT_SEQ AS "AD.DEBT_SEQ" , P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "P.DX_NUMBER" , P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO" , P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER" , P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE" , GA.UPDATED_BY AS "GA.UPDATED_BY" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.VALID_TO AS "GA.VALID_TO" , CP.CODE AS "CP.CODE" , 'EXISTING' AS "STATUS" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" , CP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , CODED_PARTIES CP , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND CP.PARTY_ID = AD.CP_PAYEE_ID AND P.PARTY_ID = CP.PARTY_ID AND GA.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY')
